title: ClumpsNew
description: This project adds smart XP orb merging and instant collection to reduce lag, improve performance, and create a smoother, more customizable gameplay experience.
body:
# ClumpsNew ![Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0108b065bc0f103eae7fac86ae571a7c8f63a475_0.webp) ## Description ClumpsNew is a Paper plugin designed to improve how XP orbs behave in Minecraft by merging nearby orbs and instantly collecting them when players are close. This reduces lag and provides a smoother gameplay experience. ## Features • **XP Orb Merging:** Merges nearby orbs to reduce lag • **Instant Absorption:** Collect XP instantly when nearby • **Customizable Settings:** Fully configurable via config.yml • **XP Boost:** Optional multiplier for extra XP • **Merge Animations:** Toggleable particle effects • **World Support:** Per-world configuration options • **Duplication Protection:** Prevents XP duplication issues
Configuration
The plugin can be easily customized via the `config.yml` file: ```yaml # ClumpsNew Configuration merge-radius: 2.0 min-xp-to-merge: 5 merge-interval-seconds: 10 instant-collect-radius: 1.5 enable-instant-collect: true enable-merging: true xp-boost-multiplier: 1.1 enable-xp-boost: true enable-merge-animations: true prevent-orb-duplication: true world-settings: overworld: merge-radius: 2.0 min-xp-to-merge: 5 merge-interval-seconds: 10 enable-instant-collect: true ```
## Connect With Us • [Discord](https://discord.gg/bDmwFdnZk2) - Join our community for support and discussions.
